reply_content: 😑​ this comment is 4 months ago anyways you missed how the game will really be played. The game is a jump rope game that involves 2 dolls holding the rope. When the light turns RED they are allowed to go forward but when the light turns GREEN they must stop and do the jump rope where if they fail they'll die, when it turns RED again the jump rope will stop and they are allowed to go forward, they have to do it over and over again until they reached the other side where the exit door is located behind the boy doll.@ykmimo

I think all players we love (like the grandma or the 120) will die in this game. Also, we can see there is an opposition between the two dolls and the sky. Maybe some players will survive like the 222, 333 or the 007 because they could vote to stay for some reason.
In this case 456 will surely vote to stay because he no longer believes in him, he no longer thinks he can save everyone after the death of his friend, so he will survive to the next game.
About the game, it's surely a revised version of red light green light. Each team has its own doll and must cross to the other side, the twist is that the opposing players will want to push each other since they will cross each other. We can also see that the land is smaller, but I have no explanation.
On my opinion, this game will be very sad like the marble game of the past season. After, the only players remaining will vote to stay, it will be a major turning point in the story. 
Especially since the VIPs arrive after this game, so the organisers must be sure that it will continue.
What do you think?
